relevance_spans.text: The key element, whether in sound, the environment, or social science, is a phenomenon called mutual causal interaction, where X affects Y, Y affects X, and so on, creating an ongoing process called a feedback loop.

title: Feedback loops: How nature gets its rhythms - Anje-Margriet Neutel
